## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Playbypoint and GrowthX for AI-assisted content creation and SEO growth.](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-assisted content creation with human oversight, capable of producing 25-500 articles/month](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Playbypoint currently has \~18k monthly traffic, aiming to compete with Court Reserve (\~42k traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves extensive research, multiple workflows, and 3 layers of human editing](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9,000/month for 50,000 words (25 articles), with programmatic SEO options available](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Assisted Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workflows and engines feeding into each other with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [250 steps across 10-12 workflows for each content piece](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Three layers of human involvement: writers, editors, and managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Capable of producing 25-500 articles per month](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Not purely AI-generated content, but AI-assisted with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### Playbypoint's Current SEO Status

  - [\~18,000 monthly organic traffic (vs competitor Court Reserve at \~42,000)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [7,500 ranking keywords (vs Court Reserve's 12,000)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Part-time SEO specialist managing basics (redirects, keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Limited current content production (last blog post \~6 months ago)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Spending \~$1,000/month on paid search](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Implementation

  - [Start with 25-30 articles/month (one per day)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Week 1: Onboarding, competitor analysis, action plan](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Week 2: Calibration articles, brand voice alignment](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Ongoing: 50,000 words/month (25 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Access needed: CMS, Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Focus on month-over-month growth rather than specific traffic targets](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

### Pricing and Availability

  - [$9,000/month for 50,000 words (25 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [$12,000/month for programmatic SEO (4x volume)](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Currently at capacity; potential 1-month delay in project kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Playbypoint to discuss internally and evaluate ROI potential](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [No immediate rush; considering implementation in next 6-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Playbypoint team to Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Playbypoint to reach out with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/vqekWXbzGhkhHXiWDsaPdRuRuqcnDA6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
